top_signals.title: Ukraine Hits 300,000-Bpd Gazprom Neft Refinery in Overnight Drone Strike
top_signals.summary: Ukraine targeted overnight the Yaroslavl oil refinery in Russia, escalating the drone attacks on Russian refining and oil exporting assets, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said on Friday. “Today, there was a report by Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of Ukraine Oleksandr Syrskyi on the use of long-range drones against Russian oil refining and export assets,” Zelenskyy wrote on social media. “In particular, overnight, the Defense Forces of Ukraine operated against targets associated with the Yaroslavl oil refinery…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nasdaq Gets Approval From SEC to List Bitcoin Index Options
top_signals.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission has given the go-ahead for Nasdaq Inc. to list index options based on the price of Bitcoin, the latest sign that Wall Street is becoming more tightly integrated with the world of digital assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: AI looms over Japan's near-record employment rate for new grads
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nagasaki officials conduct annual airing of A-bomb victim register
top_signals.summary: The register, which records the names of 202,053 victims, was exposed to the air to remove moisture after municipal employees offered a silent prayer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Incat Crowther Designed Passenger Ferry Sets Sail in the US Virgin Islands
top_signals.summary: Spirit of 1733, a new EPA tier 4 compliant 104-foot (32-meter) passenger ferry designed by global digital shipbuilder Incat Crowther for the U.S Virgin Island’s Department of Public Works has entered service. The new vessel is operating on a…
